ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist produces */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the artist was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the artist's information was last updated */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the artist is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the track is explicit */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* JSON array of artist IDs who collaborated on the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date the track was last played */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the track's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the feature belongs to */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the track */,
  "time_signature" TEXT /* Time signature of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist's information was last updated */,
  "privacy" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the playlist is public or private */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* JSON array of user IDs who can edit the playlist */,
  "track_count" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the playlist */,
  "follows" INTEGER /* Number of users who follow the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist track */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the track belongs to */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played in the playlist */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date the track was last played in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES user_playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary artist */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the album was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the album's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, artist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
